_comment: Merge these three entries into the `hooks` object of ~/.claude/settings.json (create the file if absent). They wire brain_memory_sync.py — which must sit at ~/.claude/hooks/brain_memory_sync.py — to load vault context at session start (session), flag project/memory edits (mark), and nudge a distilled brain write at session end (check). Merge additively: if the user already has SessionStart/PostToolUse/Stop entries, append to those arrays rather than replacing them.
